human_name: Book Writer — Ghostwriting Engine (Avatar Alchemist, BOOK version)
$schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Book Writer pipeline (the BOOK version of the Avatar Alchemist). The deterministic assembler/certifier run_book_writer.py walks phases[] IN ORDER (P0->P8) with NO phase skips. Each phase declares produces_artifact + its gate_codes (AF-BK-*). Every AF-BK-* below is enforced by a fail-closed, model-free, stdlib-only prover in scripts/ (py_symbol names the deciding function). Editing this file is step (i) of any Book Writer change: add the gate, add the AF code here with its trigger, add the checker, add the golden + broken-variant fixture. Anthology is the SEPARATE sibling Skill 54 and is NOT part of this pipeline.
design_law: Enforcement, not description. Every SACRED book count/floor is MEASURED on the STRIPPED text (markdown + whitespace removed) of the artifact — a model's self-reported chapter or word count is NEVER trusted, so a whitespace-padding attack cannot fake a floor. Locked title/subtitle immutability, verbatim personal-story placement, and sequential chapter-batch continuity are PROVEN, not requested. Client runtime resolves every tier (HEAVY/MID/FORMATTER/RESEARCHER/IMAGE) to the CLIENT's own providers via model-map.json — NEVER Anthropic/claude-* ids or operator keys. The provider-neutral gates are stdlib Python that run identically on every box.
source_prompt_pins_note: sha256 of each baked NON-tone prompt asset (prompts/<stage>/{system,methodology,user}.md for stages 01-03, 10-14, 19-23, 41-45); populated by `qc-book-writer.sh --repin` after Wave-1 authors the triplets, then enforced by prove_bw_process (AF-BK-HASH-PIN) + book-writer-entry.sh. The five tone stages 04-08 are pinned separately and byte-exactly against shared-utils/tone-writing-core via verify_tone_core_sync.py (NOT listed here).

modes.full: the flagship 12-chapter book (source Book Writer, 153 nodes)
modes.4x3x3: the offer book: 30 titles / 4 Transformational Outcomes / KP doc / 433_Deck_Data.json + deck outline handed to Skill 51 (source 4x3x3 w Book Writer, 121 nodes)

modes_note: Anthology is the SEPARATE future sibling Skill 54 (anthology-writer); it is referenced only as a sibling and is NOT a mode here.
gates_order_note: In-chat human checkpoints replacing the source Gmail sendAndWait forms, exact order preserved: titles -> outline -> final approval -> (optional) second revision. Each gate receipt records the human's actual reply text + timestamp; downstream stage receipts reference the gate-receipt hash they depended on (approvals cannot be back-filled).

tiers.HEAVY-WRITER: client's strongest long-form model (their OpenRouter primary or ollama-cloud large model, maxTokens 65536, baseUrl required)
tiers.FORMATTER: client's fast structured-output model; all counting/assembly is Python, not LLM
tiers.RESEARCHER: client box's configured web-search tool + a MID composer; no search -> flagged degraded section + degraded:search receipt (never silent fabrication)
tiers.IMAGE: client's own image provider/key; none configured -> cover stage parks degraded:image and the book still delivers (the cover-prompt .md is always delivered)

tiers_note: Capability tiers, NOT prescriptions. preflight.sh probes the client's configured providers and writes model-map.json + provider_caps. A client's express model choice is never substituted. NEVER Anthropic on any client box (AF-BK-ANTHROPIC).

preflight.label: run/intake.json present and prove_bw_intake.py PASS — version=book explicit, mode in {full,4x3x3}, all required fields non-boilerplate, book_stories present (N/A allowed). version=brand hands off to Skill 52, never runs here.
avatar dossier authored (stages 01-03); primary goal echoed.

phases.name: Tone: 4 style analyses + the blended 'The {First} {Last} Tone' (shared tone core)

preflight.label: prove_bw_tone.py PASS — blended tone >= 3000 stripped words; tone stages 04-08 in lockstep with shared-utils/tone-writing-core (verify_tone_core_sync.py).

phases.name: Suggested titles -> GATE-1 (client locks title + subtitle)

preflight.label: prove_bw_titlelock.py PASS — the GATE-1 locked title + subtitle appear byte-exact in every required downstream artifact.

phases.name: Blurb -> chapter titles -> outline -> GATE-2 (client approves outline)

preflight.label: prove_bw_stories.py PASS — each non-N/A personal story key phrase present in the approved outline; 12-title extraction schema-valid.

phases.name: Four STRICTLY-SEQUENTIAL chapter batches (continuity by design)

preflight.label: prove_bw_chapters.py PASS (exactly 12 chapters, each 2000-3500 stripped words) + prove_bw_continuity.py PASS (batch N receipt records sha256 of every prior chapter embedded) + prove_bw_stories.py PASS over the manuscript.

phases.name: Assemble manuscript + 30-Day Challenge + cover prompt (+ optional revision rounds)

preflight.label: prove_bw_challenge.py PASS (exactly 30 day-sections) + prove_bw_placeholder.py PASS (no unresolved {{..}}/$('..') tokens in any artifact). Cover prompt always delivered; cover image may park degraded:image.

prove_bw_noanthropic.py PASS (no /anthropic|claude/i model id in RUN-LEDGER.json; no operator credential name in run env) + prove_bw_anon.py PASS (no configured client-name token) + prove_bw_433.py PASS when mode=4x3x3.

phases.name: Deliver (labeled local bundle + signed process certificate)

preflight.label: the labeled deliverable bundle is assembled locally (~/Downloads/<First>_<Last>-Book/Book_Writer_<timestamp>/); NO n8n / Airtable / Google / Gmail / Slack / GHL. A signed process certificate is issued only after a full P0->P7 pass. 'Done' may only be claimed with the certificate path.

autofails.trigger: a required intake field (version, mode, first_name, last_name, ideal_avatar, niche, primary_goal, tone_style_1, tone_style_2, book_about, book_stories, cover_description) is missing, empty, or template boilerplate
version unset or not in {book,brand}; the answered question set does not match the version; version=brand is not handed off to Skill 52 (never run here); or mode not in {full,4x3x3}

the GATE-1 locked title and/or subtitle is not present BYTE-EXACT in the blurb, outline, any chapter payload/title page, the manuscript title page, or the cover prompt (the source 'DO NOT CHANGE ABOVE TITLES' as code)
a non-N/A personal story's normalized key phrase is absent from the approved outline AND/OR the manuscript (the outline prompt's verbatim-placement mandate as code)
the manuscript does not contain exactly 12 chapters (headings must match the stage-14 extraction)
any chapter's MEASURED stripped word count is outside [2000,3500] (self-reported count ignored; whitespace padding is inert)
a chapter-batch receipt does not record the sha256 of every prior chapter actually embedded in its dispatched payload (a batch written without its predecessors)
the blended tone document is below 3000 stripped words (per shared-utils/tone-writing-core)
the 30-Day Challenge does not have exactly 30 day-sections (heading pattern 'Day <n> —')
4x3x3 mode: not exactly 4 Transformational Outcomes AND not exactly 30 program titles
4x3x3 mode: the 12 chapters do not map into 4 phases x 3 chapters, or 433_Deck_Data.json is schema-invalid
an unresolved {{...}} or $('...') token remains in any artifact or deliverable
a model id in RUN-LEDGER.json matches /anthropic|claude/i, or an operator credential name appears in the run env
a configured client-name token appears in a shipped skill file or deliverable metadata (fixtures use fictional names only)
a phase was attempted out of order or the certificate chain is broken
a certificate was requested without a full P0->P7 pass
the enforcement-set hash (orchestrator + provers + _bw_common) does not match the pinned head (ENGINE-PIN.sha256)
a hand-rolled external uploader/notifier (Google Drive / Slack / Gmail / n8n / Airtable / GHL) is present in the run directory, bypassing the local-labeled-deliverable handoff

stages_note: Tone stages 04-08 are the shared tone core (byte-identical to shared-utils/tone-writing-core, proved by verify_tone_core_sync.py). Stage 09 is intentionally unused (the source primary-goal extract is folded into the avatar phase). Stages 41-45 run only in mode 4x3x3. Stage 23 (cover image) and 19/20 (revision rounds) are optional/degradable; the cover-prompt .md and the manuscript always deliver.
